rulings.Case Title: FELLOWSHIP MANOR APARTMENTS VS. ALBERT BRELAND ET AL
rulings.Calendar Matter: MOTION FOR SUMMARY JUDGMENT, UNLAWFUL DETAINER
rulings.Rulings: Real Property/Housing Court Law and Motion Calendar for Tuesday May 24, 2016, line 3. PLAINTIFF FELLOWSHIP MANOR APARTMENTS MOTION FOR SUMMARY JUDGMENT, UNLAWFUL DETAINER DENIED. There are multiple triable issues of fact including but not limited to: the facts of the incident that occurred on July 24, 2015, see paragraph 4 of the separate statement, as well as, the Commer and Butler declaration. = (501/REQ)
